texto: Frugality is one of the most beautiful and joyful words in the English language, and yet one that we are culturally cut off from understanding and enjoying. The consumption society has made us feel that happiness lies in having things, and has failed to teach us the happiness of not having things.
explicacao: Citação de Elise Boulding sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “Frugality is one of the most beautiful and joyful words in the English language, and yet one that…” articula felicidade, consumption, frugality em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como frugality e happiness.
